heroBanner.description: Kloster Kitchen health/wellness brand hero banner with ginger-focused imagery

modules.designRationale: Large hero banner establishing brand identity and wellness positioning

tiles.description: Health/wellness hero banner with ginger-focused product imagery
Narrow band providing visual separation between hero and category tiles

modules.designRationale: Eight small category tiles providing quick navigation to product ranges

tiles.description: Narrow promotional banner or content divider

heroBanner.description: Ginger shots category hero with fresh ginger and immune-boost positioning

pages.designNote: Product category page with moderate editorial content (8 images + 1 video). Hero banner + supporting product banners + product grid. Ginger-focused health benefits emphasis.

heroBanner.description: Micronutrients category hero with vitamins and mineral focus

pages.designNote: Product category page with moderate editorial content (7 images + 1 video). Hero banner + supporting content + product grid. Positioned as supplemental nutrition range.

heroBanner.description: Juice cure/cleanse category hero with detox and wellness messaging

pages.designNote: Product category page with moderate editorial content (7 images + 1 video). Positioned as wellness/detox program with hero + supporting banners + product grid.

heroBanner.description: Smoothies category hero with blended beverage and nutrition focus

pages.designNote: Product category page with substantial editorial content (7 images, no video). Hero banner + multiple supporting product highlight banners + product grid.

heroBanner.description: Shot cure/wellness program hero with concentrated nutrient shots

pages.designNote: Product category page with minimal editorial (4 images + 1 video). Hero + supporting content + product grid. Positioned as structured wellness program.

heroBanner.description: Trial sets and gift ideas hero with product variety and gifting emphasis

pages.designNote: Product category page with moderate editorial (5 images + 1 video). Hero + supporting banners highlighting sampler packs and gift options + product grid. Cross-sells entire product range in convenient sizes.

heroBanner.description: Accessories category hero with preparation tools and equipment focus

pages.designNote: Product category page with minimal editorial (2 images + 1 video). Smallest page by content volume - accessories and tools supporting main products (shakers, bottles, preparation aids, etc.). Hero + minimal supporting content + product grid.

heroBanner.description: Subscription/savings program hero emphasizing recurring delivery and value

pages.designNote: Subscription promotion page with substantial editorial content (7 images, no video). Hero + multiple benefit-focused banners promoting subscription advantages (savings, convenience, consistency) + subscription product grid. Image-heavy strategy without video.

heroBanner.description: Brand story hero with company mission, ginger sourcing, and wellness philosophy

pages.designNote: Brand storytelling page (6 images + 1 video) positioning company values and product philosophy. Hero + multiple sections covering brand story, ginger sourcing/quality, wellness mission, company background. Moderate content depth for trust-building.

colorScheme.rationale: Health and wellness positioning uses light, natural color palette conveying freshness, purity, and natural ingredients

typography.primary: Clean sans-serif, mixed case with emphasis on readability
typography.characteristics: Approachable, modern, wellness-focused. Category names emphasize product benefits (Saftkuren = juice cure).

photography.style: Fresh, natural product and ingredient photography
photography.lighting: Bright, natural lighting emphasizing ingredient freshness and health benefits
photography.subjects: Ginger roots, fresh juices, smoothies, product bottles, wellness and vitality imagery

layoutPatterns.homepage: Large hero (872x545) + narrow divider (872x546) + small category grid (8x218x218) + promotional strip (750x160)
layoutPatterns.categoryPages: Consistent hero (1872x400) + supporting banners + product grid
layoutPatterns.contentStrategy: Template-consistent approach with 4-8 editorial images per category + selective video use

hierarchyStructure.navigationDepth: 1 level - flat navigation with 10 own pages
hierarchyStructure.distribution: Balanced per-page editorial (2-8 images, avg 6.4) across all product categories
hierarchyStructure.strategy: Flat navigation maximizes discoverability of all product ranges at equal hierarchy level

distribution.rationale: Homepage hero + navigation structure - visual gateway with 8 category tiles for quick access to all product ranges
Subscription promotion - image-heavy strategy emphasizing recurring benefits and savings without video
Core product category - hero ginger-based product with moderate editorial content + video
Key supplement category - substantial editorial depth with video demonstrating nutritional benefits
Wellness program category - editorial content emphasizing detox/cleanse benefits + video
Product category - substantial editorial content focused on smoothie variants and consumption occasions, no video
Brand storytelling hub - company mission, ginger sourcing, wellness philosophy with supporting video
Cross-sell category - moderate editorial showcasing product variety and gift appeal + video
Specialized program category - minimal editorial positioning as structured wellness protocol + video
Accessories/tools category - minimal editorial (smallest page) focusing on supplementary products + video

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Light, natural color palette with emphasis on fresh ingredients. Product-forward photography highlighting ginger, juices, and natural wellness benefits. Clean, modern typography conveying accessibility and approachability. Bright, natural lighting creates healthy, vitality-focused aesthetic.
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Health-conscious consumers, wellness enthusiasts, immune-support seekers, natural supplement users, gift-givers seeking wellness products
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Flat single-level navigation presents all 10 product categories as equally accessible options. Rather than hierarchical specialization (like multi-level supplement stores), Kloster Kitchen uses homogeneous layout (8 equal 218x218 tiles on homepage) to distribute attention equally across Ingwer Shots, Mikronährstoffe, Saftkuren, SMOOTHIES, Shot Kur, Probiersets, Spar-Abo, and Zubehör. This egalitarian structure emphasizes product diversity within a coherent ginger/wellness theme.
brandIdentity.productRange: D2C health/wellness brand specializing in ginger-based shots, juices, smoothies, and micronutrient supplements. Offerings organized around consumption occasions (quick shots), wellness programs (Saftkuren, Shot Kur), ongoing supplementation (Mikronährstoffe), and convenience options (subscription, trial sets).
